markdown:
#  Why can’t I deactivate a Cost Type, Cost Code or Sub Job in WBS? 
##  Answer 
Only **Custom Segments** can be deactivated. Cost type, Cost Code and Sub Job are not custom segments and cannot be deactivated. See [What are segments and segment items?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-segments-and-segment-items)

  * [Why can't I create WBS custom segments?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-why-cant-i-create-wbs-custom-segments)
title: Why can’t I deactivate a Cost Type, Cost Code or Sub Job in WBS?
description: Explains why a Cost Type, Cost Code, or Sub Job cannot be deactivated in WBS.
